name: Petty Thief
text: A figure slips through the window. They eye your GPUs...
text_zh: 一个黑影从窗户翻进来，盯着你的显卡……

name: Power Outage
text: The lights flicker and die. Your mining rigs go silent.
text_zh: 灯闪了一下熄灭。所有矿机陷入沉默。

name: Nosy Neighbor
text: Mrs. Chen from 2B says the humming is keeping her awake. She's threatening to call the cops.
text_zh: 2B 的陈阿姨说你的风扇吵得她睡不着，扬言要报警。

name: Tech Share
text: A friendly group-chat kitten just posted a new undervolting trick. You take notes.
text_zh: 群里一只友好的小猫刚刚分享了新的降压技巧。你记下来了。

name: Mysterious Delivery
text: A package with no return address. Inside: a GPU that clearly fell off a truck. Finders keepers?
text_zh: 没有寄件人的包裹。里面是一张「从卡车上掉下来的」显卡。拿了不亏？

name: BTC Pump
text: Somewhere, a tweet fires. The whole market surges — your rigs cash in harder for a few minutes.
text_zh: 某处一条推文爆了。全场涨价，接下来几分钟产出大涨。

name: Lucky Fish Can
text: You find a forgotten tuna can in the drawer. Small morale boost. Big mining boost.
text_zh: 抽屉里发现一罐忘了的金枪鱼。士气微涨，算力大涨。

name: The Admin Wakes Up
text: Footsteps in the corridor. Someone noticed the fans.
text_zh: 走廊里传来脚步声。有人注意到风扇的声音了。

name: Underground Tunnel Heist
text: A hole appears in the concrete floor. Well-funded enemies emerge.
text_zh: 水泥地上突然出现一个洞。装备精良的敌人从里面爬出来。

name: Caribbean Pirates
text: A dinghy pulls up to the container. Someone yells 'YARR' in a suspiciously practiced voice.
text_zh: 一艘小艇靠到集装箱边。有人用可疑熟练的嗓子喊「YARR」。

name: Stray Dog Visit
text: A dog wanders in, sniffs a GPU fan, and curls up nearby. Morale +1.
text_zh: 一只流浪狗溜进来，闻了闻显卡风扇，在旁边打了个盹。士气 +1。

name: Roof Leak
text: Water drips through the ceiling. One GPU is looking damp.
text_zh: 屋顶开始滴水。有一张显卡看着有点湿。

name: Something Smells Off
text: A faint sweet smell. You should probably open a window.
text_zh: 一股甜腥味。你大概应该开个窗。

name: Typhoon
text: The ship pitches hard. A GPU slides off its rack.
text_zh: 船剧烈摇晃，一张显卡从架子上滑了下来。

name: Police at the Door
text: A polite knock. Someone in a uniform wants to talk about the noise. And the power draw. And the cats.
text_zh: 礼貌的敲门声。有个穿制服的人想和你聊聊噪音。还有耗电。还有这堆猫。

name: Group Chat SOS
text: A kitten in the miners chat just got raided. Everyone's pitching in for legal fees.
text_zh: 群里一只小猫刚被查了。大家都在凑律师费。

name: Crypto Influencer Interview
text: Someone with a lot of followers wants a tour of your rack. The exposure could go either way.
text_zh: 一个粉丝很多的网红想拍你的机架。曝光可能好，可能不好。

name: Halving Day
text: The chain halves its reward. Short-term chaos, mid-term price bump.
text_zh: 链上奖励减半。短期混乱，中期拉盘。

name: Voltage Dip
text: The mains sag. Every rig throttles for a while.
text_zh: 电压拉跨，所有机器被迫降频。

name: Polar Bear Audit
text: A curious bear wandered in and sat on a rack. It eventually left. The rack didn't survive.
text_zh: 一只好奇的熊晃进来，坐上了机架。它最后离开了。机架没挺过来。

name: Aurora Surge
text: The aurora lights the whole sky. Something about the ionosphere boosts your signal.
text_zh: 极光点亮了整片天空。电离层的某些变化让你的信号变强。

name: Radiation Glitch
text: A single cosmic-ray flipped the wrong bit. One GPU is behaving… strangely.
text_zh: 一粒宇宙射线翻错了一个比特位。有张显卡开始表现得……有点怪。

name: Government Raid
text: Black vans outside. Someone files a report about unauthorised use of a decommissioned facility.
text_zh: 门口停着黑色的车。有人在举报你擅自使用已退役的设施。

name: Space Debris
text: A micro-meteor pinged the hull. Pressure held. One GPU did not.
text_zh: 一块微流星打中了舱壁。气压保住了。但一张显卡没保住。

name: ISS Astronaut Visit
text: An astronaut floats over, admires the rig, and pretends they didn't see it.
text_zh: 一位宇航员飘过来，欣赏了一下你的矿机，然后装作没看见。

name: Seagull Theft
text: A seagull makes off with a GPU fan blade. Repair will take a bit.
text_zh: 一只海鸥叼走了一片风扇叶。修起来要点时间。

name: Tax Audit
text: A very serious kitten in a tie is at the door. They want to see the books.
text_zh: 门口站着一只系领带的猫，神情严肃。它想看你的账。

name: Power Surge
text: A mains spike rips down the overclocked rail. Something on the boosted bus is about to regret it.
text_zh: 市电浪涌顺着超频的那一路电源冲进来，那条总线上的卡要遭殃了。

name: Market Crash
text: Red candles everywhere. The whole board flash-crashes and stays pinned at the floor.
text_zh: 全线飘红。大盘瞬间闪崩，价格被砸到地板上动不了。

name: PSU Explodes
text: A PSU pops with a smell of melted plastic. Several rigs go dark.
text_zh: 电源砰的一声炸了，闻到一股烧焦塑料味，几台矿机随之熄灭。

name: Sketchy PSU Smoking
text: That dumpster PSU has been wheezing for hours. It's smoking now. Productivity tanks.
text_zh: 那台垃圾桶电源已经吭哧吭哧好几个小时了，现在开始冒烟。产能直线下降。

name: Mining Disaster Sell-off
text: The price tanked, miners panicked, the panic tanked the price more. Spiral.
text_zh: 币价崩了，矿工恐慌抛售，恐慌又把币价砸得更低。死亡螺旋。

name: Pool Runaway
text: The pool's website is down. Their Telegram is gone. So is your unsettled balance.
text_zh: 矿池官网打不开，电报群也消失了，你那点没结算的份额一起人间蒸发。

name: Solo Block Hit!
text: Against all odds, your lone rig solved a block. The chain pays out in full.
text_zh: 天降好运，你这台孤鬼矿机居然爆了一整块。整块奖励落袋。

name: PSU Chain Reaction
text: One trash PSU pops and takes its neighbours with it. The whole rail goes up.
text_zh: 一台垃圾电源炸了，连带把旁边几台一起拖下水。整条电源线全废。

name: Pool Share Dilution
text: A whale just plugged in to your pool. Your share of the next payout window shrinks.
text_zh: 一头大鲸鱼刚刚接入你所在的矿池，你在下个结算窗口的份额被稀释。

name: Mining Disaster Fire Sale
text: Panicked miners are unloading hardware at any price. A buyer's market opens for a moment.
text_zh: 恐慌的矿工们抛售硬件，价格随便砍。短暂的买方市场窗口打开。
